claims: The WPHX-312.55 WP_Http::is_ip_address candidate now uses the WPHX compiler-emitted grouped original-path class-wp-http.php public shell.
The generated shell preserves the public static is_ip_address($maybe_ip) ABI and delegates the IP-version decision to the stock Haxe PHP implementation helper.
The previous copied or runner-patched temporary public PHP shell is no longer the authority for the is_ip_address boundary.
non_claims: This receipt does not claim whole-file WP_Http ownership.

This receipt does not claim WP_Http::request ownership, live HTTP transport behavior, installed WordPress distribution behavior, generated WP_Http_Cookie ownership, or broader WP_Http helper ownership.
